strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025
Founded and maintains an event-driven open-source GIS platform, showing long-term ownership
concerns: No CTO, VP Engineering, or Head-of-Engineering title anywhere on the resume — entire career is individual-contributor 'Senior/Staff Developer' roles
Zero evidence of leading or scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people, hiring senior leadership, or governing outsourced delivery partners
No production multi-agent AI systems, no LangGraph, no LLM evaluation pipelines, no fintech credit-risk or real-time trade decisioning experience
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned individual contributor with broad full-stack range, but the role demands a Chief Technology Officer with 5+ years of senior technical leadership, a track record of scaling teams to 30+, production multi-agent AI systems, and fintech infrastructure depth — none of which appear on the resume. Recent AI-agent exposure is limited to roughly a year of contribution-level MCP tooling work, fintech experience is confined to a pricing team at a direct-mail platform and a brief stint at an investment scale-up, and there is no evidence of board-level communication, hiring senior leaders, or governing external delivery partners. The profile reads as a strong staff engineer, not a CTO for an agentic-AI fintech scale-up.
